title: 1Pcs Butterfly Style Folding Hand Fan, Rave Fan with Fluorescent Design, Portable Performance Prop for Music Festivals and Dance Performances, 65 x 34 cm
features: 【Festival-Ready Performance Prop】Ideal for music festival dance performances and outdoor parties; The loud clack sound enhances rhythmic movements while the 65 x 34 cm size provides optimal visibility; Creates dynamic visual effects when used with UV or blacklight setups

【High-Quality Plastic Material】Made from durable plastic material, this rave fan maintains its shape and vibrant colors through repeated use; The lightweight construction allows for effortless handling during performances; The smooth folding mechanism ensures reliable operation every time

【Butterfly Style Folding Hand Fan】This fluorescent hand fan features a unique butterfly design that glows under blacklight; Perfect for adding vibrant visual effects to dance performances and social media content creation; The folding design ensures easy storage and portability

【Convenient Portable Design】The folding hand fan collapses to compact size for easy carrying in dance bags or purses; Quick-open mechanism allows for instant deployment during performances; Ergonomic handle provides secure grip for complex dance routines

【Versatile Decorative Accessory】Beyond dance performances, this festival fan serves as striking party decoration or photo prop; The fluorescent butterfly pattern creates eye-catching effects in various lighting conditions; Suitable for content creators seeking unique visual elements
